title: Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei

infobox.value: Members of the [Brunei royal family](/wiki/House_of_Bolkiah "House of Bolkiah")
[Family Order of Laila Utama](/wiki/Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama "Family Order of Laila Utama")

infobox.key: The Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei
infobox.value: ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Kerabat Mahkota Brunei*) is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 15 August 1982 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1) The order carries the [post-nominal letters](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") "DKMB".[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/dd/Flag_of_Oman.svg/40px-Flag_of_Oman.svg.png) [Oman](/wiki/Oman "Oman"): Sultan **[Qaboos bin Said](/wiki/Qaboos_bin_Said "Qaboos bin Said")**, [Sultan of Oman](/wiki/List_of_rulers_of_Oman "List of rulers of Oman") **(1984)**

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan [**Azlan Shah**](/wiki/Azlan_Shah_of_Perak "Azlan Shah of Perak"), [Sultan of Perak](/wiki/Sultan_of_Perak "Sultan of Perak") & 9th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1988)**

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a5/Flag_of_the_United_Kingdom_%281-2%29.svg/40px-Flag_of_the_United_Kingdom_%281-2%29.svg.png) [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom"): Queen **[Elizabeth II](/wiki/Elizabeth_II "Elizabeth II")**, [Queen of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Monarchy_of_the_United_Kingdom "Monarchy of the United Kingdom") and the other [Commonwealth Realms](/wiki/Commonwealth_realm "Commonwealth realm") **(1992)**[[4]](#cite_note-4)

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Mizan Zainal Abidin](/wiki/Mizan_Zainal_Abidin_of_Terengganu "Mizan Zainal Abidin of Terengganu")**, [Sultan of Terengganu](/wiki/Terengganu_Sultanate "Terengganu Sultanate") & 13th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1999)**

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Abdul Halim](/wiki/Abdul_Halim_of_Kedah "Abdul Halim of Kedah")**, [Sultan of Kedah](/wiki/Kedah_Sultanate "Kedah Sultanate") & 5th and 14th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(2002)**

It was established on 15 August 1982 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1) The order carries the [post-nominal letters](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") "DKMB".[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Order of Brunei

| Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei | |
| --- | --- |
| DKMB neck decoration | |
| Awarded by the [Sultan of Brunei](/wiki/Sultan_of_Brunei "Sultan of Brunei") | |
| Type | [Royal family order](/wiki/Royal_family_order "Royal family order") |
| Established | 15 August 1982 |
| Country | [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei") |
| Eligibility | Members of the [Brunei royal family](/wiki/House_of_Bolkiah "House of Bolkiah") |
| Criteria | [At His Majesty's pleasure](/wiki/At_His_Majesty%27s_pleasure "At His Majesty's pleasure") |
| Status | Currently constituted |
| Sovereign | [Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah") |
| Post-nominals | DKMB |
| Precedence | |
| Next (lower) | [Family Order of Laila Utama](/wiki/Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama "Family Order of Laila Utama") |
|  | |

**The Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei** ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Kerabat Mahkota Brunei*) is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 15 August 1982 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1) The order carries the [post-nominal letters](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") "DKMB".[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Recipients")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This list is [incomplete](/wiki/Wikipedia:WikiProject_Lists#Incomplete_lists "Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists"); you can help by [adding missing items](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit). *(October 2020)* |

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e1/President_Rodrigo_Roa_Duterte_Attends_Golden_Jubilee_Celebration_of_Brunei_Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah%E2%80%99s_Accession_to_the_Throne_1.jpg/250px-President_Rodrigo_Roa_Duterte_Attends_Golden_Jubilee_Celebration_of_Brunei_Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah%E2%80%99s_Accession_to_the_Throne_1.jpg)](/wiki/File:President_Rodrigo_Roa_Duterte_Attends_Golden_Jubilee_Celebration_of_Brunei_Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah%E2%80%99s_Accession_to_the_Throne_1.jpg)

[Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah") and [Queen Saleha](/wiki/Queen_Saleha_of_Brunei "Queen Saleha of Brunei") wearing the order's [sash](/wiki/Sash "Sash") in 2017

### Bruneian royalty

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Bruneian royalty")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3d/Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463234753.jpg/250px-Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463234753.jpg)](/wiki/File:Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463234753.jpg)

Prince Abdul Mateen wearing his sash in 2024

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/81/Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53462187612.jpg/250px-Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53462187612.jpg)](/wiki/File:Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53462187612.jpg)

Prince Sufri Bolkiah wearing his sash in 2024

#### Current recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Current recipients")]

* Sultan Haji **[Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah")**, [Sultan](/wiki/Sultan_of_Brunei "Sultan of Brunei") and [Yang di-Pertuan of Brunei](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Negara "Yang di-Pertuan Negara") (15 August 1982)
* Raja Isteri Pengiran Anak Hajah [**Saleha**](/wiki/Queen_Saleha_of_Brunei "Queen Saleha of Brunei"), [Queen Consort of Brunei](/wiki/List_of_sultans_of_Brunei "List of sultans of Brunei") (15 August 1982)
* Pengiran Muda Mahkota Pengiran Muda Haji **[Al-Muhtadee Billah](/wiki/Al-Muhtadee_Billah "Al-Muhtadee Billah")**, [Crown Prince of Brunei](/wiki/Malay_styles_and_titles "Malay styles and titles") (15 August 1982)
* Pengiran Anak Puteri Hajah **[Rashidah Sa'adatul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Rashidah_of_Brunei "Princess Rashidah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri Hajah **[Muta-Wakkilah Hayatul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Muta-Wakkilah_of_Brunei "Princess Muta-Wakkilah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri Hajah **[Majeedah Nuurul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Majeedah_of_Brunei "Princess Majeedah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri Hajah **[Hafizah Sururul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Hafizah_of_Brunei "Princess Hafizah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda **[Abdul Malik](/wiki/Prince_Malik_of_Brunei "Prince Malik of Brunei")**, Prince of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri **[Azemah Ni'matul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Azemah_of_Brunei "Princess Azemah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri **[Fadzilah Lubabul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Fadzilah_of_Brunei "Princess Fadzilah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda **[Abdul Mateen](/wiki/Prince_Mateen_of_Brunei "Prince Mateen of Brunei")**, Prince of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda **[Abdul Wakeel](/wiki/Prince_Abdul_Wakeel_of_Brunei "Prince Abdul Wakeel of Brunei")**, Prince of Brunei
* Pengiran Anak Puteri **[Ameerah Wardatul Bolkiah](/wiki/Princess_Ameerah_of_Brunei "Princess Ameerah of Brunei")**, Princess of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda Haji [**Mohamed Bolkiah**](/wiki/Mohamed_Bolkiah,_Prince_of_Brunei "Mohamed Bolkiah, Prince of Brunei"), Prince of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda Haji **[Sufri Bolkiah](/wiki/Sufri_Bolkiah "Sufri Bolkiah")**, Prince of Brunei
* Pengiran Muda Haji **[Jefri Bolkiah](/wiki/Jefri_Bolkiah,_Prince_of_Brunei "Jefri Bolkiah, Prince of Brunei")**, Prince of Brunei

#### Former recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Former recipients")]

* Sultan Sir Muda Haji **[Omar Ali Saifuddien III](/wiki/Omar_Ali_Saifuddien_III "Omar Ali Saifuddien III")**, former [Sultan of Brunei](/wiki/Sultan_of_Brunei "Sultan of Brunei") *(deceased)*
* Pengiran Muda Haji [**Abdul Azim**](/wiki/Prince_Azim_of_Brunei "Prince Azim of Brunei"), Prince of Brunei *(deceased)*
* Hajah **[Mariam](/wiki/Mariam_Abdul_Aziz "Mariam Abdul Aziz")**, former consort of Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah *(revoked)*
* [**Azrinaz Mazhar**](/wiki/Azrinaz_Mazhar_Hakim "Azrinaz Mazhar Hakim"), former consort of Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah *(revoked)*

### Foreign recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Foreign recipients")]

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c0/Flag_of_Jordan.svg/40px-Flag_of_Jordan.svg.png) [Jordan](/wiki/Jordan "Jordan"): King **[Hussein I bin Talal I](/wiki/Hussein_of_Jordan "Hussein of Jordan")**, [King of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan](/wiki/List_of_kings_of_Jordan "List of kings of Jordan") **(1984)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/dd/Flag_of_Oman.svg/40px-Flag_of_Oman.svg.png) [Oman](/wiki/Oman "Oman"): Sultan **[Qaboos bin Said](/wiki/Qaboos_bin_Said "Qaboos bin Said")**, [Sultan of Oman](/wiki/List_of_rulers_of_Oman "List of rulers of Oman") **(1984)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Ismail Petra](/wiki/Ismail_Petra_of_Kelantan "Ismail Petra of Kelantan")**, [Sultan of Kelantan](/wiki/Kelantan_Sultanate "Kelantan Sultanate") **(1988)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan [**Azlan Shah**](/wiki/Azlan_Shah_of_Perak "Azlan Shah of Perak"), [Sultan of Perak](/wiki/Sultan_of_Perak "Sultan of Perak") & 9th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1988)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Iskandar](/wiki/Iskandar_of_Johor "Iskandar of Johor")**, [Sultan of Johor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Johor "Sultan of Johor") & 8th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1988)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9f/Flag_of_Indonesia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Indonesia.svg.png) [Indonesia](/wiki/Indonesia "Indonesia"): President **[Soeharto](/wiki/Suharto "Suharto")**, [President of Indonesia](/wiki/President_of_Indonesia "President of Indonesia") **(1988)**[[3]](#cite_note-3)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a9/Flag_of_Thailand.svg/40px-Flag_of_Thailand.svg.png) [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand"): King **[Bhumibol Adulyadej](/wiki/Bhumibol_Adulyadej "Bhumibol Adulyadej")**, [King of Thailand](/wiki/Monarchy_of_Thailand "Monarchy of Thailand") **(1990)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a5/Flag_of_the_United_Kingdom_%281-2%29.svg/40px-Flag_of_the_United_Kingdom_%281-2%29.svg.png) [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom"): Queen **[Elizabeth II](/wiki/Elizabeth_II "Elizabeth II")**, [Queen of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Monarchy_of_the_United_Kingdom "Monarchy of the United Kingdom") and the other [Commonwealth Realms](/wiki/Commonwealth_realm "Commonwealth realm") **(1992)**[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Tuanku **[Ja'afar](/wiki/Ja%27afar_of_Negeri_Sembilan "Ja'afar of Negeri Sembilan")**, [Yang di-Pertuan Besar of Negeri Sembilan](/wiki/Yamtuan_Besar "Yamtuan Besar") & 10th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1996)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Mizan Zainal Abidin](/wiki/Mizan_Zainal_Abidin_of_Terengganu "Mizan Zainal Abidin of Terengganu")**, [Sultan of Terengganu](/wiki/Terengganu_Sultanate "Terengganu Sultanate") & 13th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(1999)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Tuanku **[Syed Sirajuddin](/wiki/Sirajuddin_of_Perlis "Sirajuddin of Perlis")**, [Raja of Perlis](/wiki/House_of_Jamalullail_(Perlis) "House of Jamalullail (Perlis)") & 12th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(2002)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Abdul Halim](/wiki/Abdul_Halim_of_Kedah "Abdul Halim of Kedah")**, [Sultan of Kedah](/wiki/Kedah_Sultanate "Kedah Sultanate") & 5th and 14th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(2002)**
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/4/4c/Flag_of_Sweden.svg/40px-Flag_of_Sweden.svg.png) [Sweden](/wiki/Sweden "Sweden"): King **[Carl XVI Gustaf](/wiki/Carl_XVI_Gustaf "Carl XVI Gustaf")**, [King of Sweden](/wiki/List_of_Swedish_monarchs "List of Swedish monarchs") **(2004)**[[5]](#cite_note-5)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c0/Flag_of_Jordan.svg/40px-Flag_of_Jordan.svg.png) [Jordan](/wiki/Jordan "Jordan"): King **[Abdullah II bin Hussein I](/wiki/Abdullah_II_of_Jordan "Abdullah II of Jordan")**, [King of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan](/wiki/List_of_kings_of_Jordan "List of kings of Jordan") **(2008)**[[6]](#cite_note-6)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/20/Flag_of_the_Netherlands.svg/40px-Flag_of_the_Netherlands.svg.png) [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands "Netherlands"): Princess **[Beatrix of the Netherlands](/wiki/Beatrix_of_the_Netherlands "Beatrix of the Netherlands")**, former [Queen of the Netherlands](/wiki/List_of_monarchs_of_the_Netherlands "List of monarchs of the Netherlands") **(2013)**[[7]](#cite_note-7) *(conferred as Queen)*
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan **[Ibrahim Ismail](/wiki/Ibrahim_Ismail_of_Johor "Ibrahim Ismail of Johor")**, [Sultan of Johor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Johor "Sultan of Johor") & 17th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(2014)**[[8]](#cite_note-8)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/aa/Flag_of_Kuwait.svg/40px-Flag_of_Kuwait.svg.png) [Kuwait](/wiki/Kuwait "Kuwait"): Sheikh **[Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah](/wiki/Sabah_Al-Ahmad_Al-Jaber_Al-Sabah "Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah")**, [Emir of Kuwait](/wiki/Emir_of_Kuwait "Emir of Kuwait") **(2015)**[[9]](#cite_note-9)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0d/Flag_of_Saudi_Arabia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Saudi_Arabia.svg.png) [Saudi Arabia](/wiki/Saudi_Arabia "Saudi Arabia"): King **[Salman](/wiki/Salman_of_Saudi_Arabia "Salman of Saudi Arabia")**, [King of Saudi Arabia](/wiki/King_of_Saudi_Arabia "King of Saudi Arabia") **(2017)**[[10]](#cite_note-10)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/Flag_of_Bahrain.svg/40px-Flag_of_Bahrain.svg.png) [Bahrain](/wiki/Bahrain "Bahrain"): King **[Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa](/wiki/Hamad_bin_Isa_Al_Khalifa "Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa")**, [King of Bahrain](/wiki/King_of_Bahrain "King of Bahrain") **(2017)**[[11]](#cite_note-11)
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Al-Sultan [**Abdullah**](/wiki/Abdullah_of_Pahang "Abdullah of Pahang"), [Sultan of Pahang](/wiki/Sultan_of_Pahang "Sultan of Pahang") & 16th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong") **(2019)[[12]](#cite_note-12)**

* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan [**Mahmud**](/wiki/Mahmud_of_Terengganu "Mahmud of Terengganu"), [Sultan of Terengganu](/wiki/Sultan_of_Terengganu "Sultan of Terengganu")
* ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/66/Flag_of_Malaysia.svg/40px-Flag_of_Malaysia.svg.png) [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"): Sultan [**Salahuddin**](/wiki/Salahuddin_of_Selangor "Salahuddin of Selangor"), [Sultan of Selangor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Selangor "Sultan of Selangor") & 11th [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong")
